acceptance_criteria: docs/clients.md Elk, Tusky, and Tuba rows all show checkmarks; all three clients can complete login, view timeline, post, attach media, reply, view notifications, and receive streaming updates
description: Full end-to-end manual testing of Elk (web), Tusky (Android), and Tuba (GTK) against a real smallhold instance. Test all columns in docs/clients.md matrix. Fix failures. These three complete the five-client target from the spec.
design: Elk uses WebSocket streaming (not SSE) — ensure WS endpoint works. Tusky and Tuba may handle some edge cases differently. Fix by matching mastodon.social response shapes. Document any client-specific workarounds needed.
title: Client compatibility: Elk, Tusky, Tuba
